description: Execute large language models using Firebase Vertex AI, governed by the security of Firebase App Check.
Manage and deploy prompt templates centrally for Firebase AI Logic applications to maintain consistency and ease of updates.
Firebase App Check protects your backend APIs from abuse, such as billing fraud and phishing, by attesting that traffic originates from your genuine app.
Firebase App Hosting provides a severless, fully managed environment tailored for deploying modern web frameworks seamlessly to a global edge network.
Firebase Authentication provides backend services, easy-to-use SDKs, and ready-made UI libraries to securely authenticate users to your application.
Provisions a unified Firebase project along with registered application clients for Apple (iOS), Android, and Web platforms.
Deploy and manage robust Cloud Firestore Security Rules to establish strict access control and data validation for your database.
